P

Pack - Class in product
It implements the packs
Pack(double, LocalDate) - Constructor for class product.Pack
Creates a new pack with no products
Pack(double, ArrayList<StoreProduct>) - Constructor for class product.Pack
Creates a new pack with default id and date
Pack(double, ArrayList<StoreProduct>, LocalDate) - Constructor for class product.Pack
Creates a new pack with default id
Pack(int, double, LocalDate) - Constructor for class product.Pack
Creates a new pack with no products
Pack(int, double, ArrayList<StoreProduct>, LocalDate) - Constructor for class product.Pack
Creates a new pack
PACK - Enum constant in enum class discount.DiscountCoverage
Pack discount coverage
PACK_CART - Enum constant in enum class notification.NotificationType
 
PackDiscount - Class in discount
It implements the general discount for those with Pack coverage
PackDiscount(DiscountType, DiscountCoverage, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Constructor for class discount.PackDiscount
A Pack discount's constructor with default id
PackDiscount(String, DiscountType, DiscountCoverage, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Constructor for class discount.PackDiscount
A Pack discount's general constructor
PackDiscountFactory - Class in discount
It implements the factory for those with pack coverage
PackDiscountFactory(Pack...) - Constructor for class discount.PackDiscountFactory
Instantiates a new Pack discount factory
PackFixedPercentage - Class in discount
It implements the Pack discount whose type is Fixed Percentage
PackFixedPercentage(String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, double, Pack...) - Constructor for class discount.PackFixedPercentage
A fixed percentage discount's general constructor with packs
PackFixedPercentage(LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, double, Pack...) - Constructor for class discount.PackFixedPercentage
Instantiates a new fixed percentage discount with packs
PackGift - Class in discount
It implements the Pack discount whose type is Gift
PackGift(String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, double, StoreProduct, Pack...) - Constructor for class discount.PackGift
A gift discount's general constructor with packs
PackGift(LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, double, StoreProduct, Pack...) - Constructor for class discount.PackGift
Instantiates a new gift discount with packs
PackQuantity - Class in discount
It implements the Pack discount whose type is Quantity
PackQuantity(String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, int, double, Pack...) - Constructor for class discount.PackQuantity
A quantity discount's general constructor with packs
PackQuantity(LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, int, double, Pack...) - Constructor for class discount.PackQuantity
Instantiates a new quantity discount with packs
PackVolume - Class in discount
It implements the Pack discount whose type is Volume
PackVolume(String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, double, double, Pack...) - Constructor for class discount.PackVolume
A volume discount's general constructor with packs
PackVolume(LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime, double, double, Pack...) - Constructor for class discount.PackVolume
Instantiates a new Volume discount with packs
pageCategoryList(int) - Method in class store.Pager
It gets a sub-list of categories according to the desired page
pageDiscountList(int) - Method in class store.Pager
It gets a sub-list of discounts according to the desired page
pageEmployeeList(int) - Method in class store.Pager
It gets a sub-list of employees according to the desired page
pagePackList(int) - Method in class store.Pager
It gets a sub-list of packs according to the desired page
Pager - Class in store
It implements the store's pager, used for dividing big lists into small sub-lists of a desired size (lines-wise), helpful when browsing (check main)
pageRegisteredClientList(int) - Method in class store.Pager
It gets a sub-list of registered clients according to the desired page
pageReviewList(List<Review>, int) - Method in class store.Pager
It gets a sub-list of another according to the desired page
pageStoreProductList(List<StoreProduct>, int) - Method in class store.Pager
It gets a sub-list of another according to the desired page
PAID - Enum constant in enum class order.OrderState
 
Parameter - Class in store
It defines the store parameters
PAYMENT - Enum constant in enum class notification.NotificationType
 
payOrder() - Method in class order.Cart
 
payValuation() - Method in class product.SecondHandProduct
Pays the valuation of a second-hand product
PENDING - Enum constant in enum class exchange.OfferStatus
The offer was made but is yet to be accepted or rejected
PERFECT - Enum constant in enum class product.ConservationStatus
Perfect conservation status
Permission - Enum Class in user
It defines the user types
PICKED_UP - Enum constant in enum class order.OrderState
 
PriceFilter - Class in search
It implements the price filter
PriceFilter(double, double) - Constructor for class search.PriceFilter
Creates a new price filter

It prints the product's info when managed
printAllInfo() - Method in class product.Figurine
It prints the product's info when managed
printAllInfo() - Method in class product.Game
It prints the product's info when managed
printAllInfo() - Method in class product.Product
It prints the product's info when managed
printAllInfo() - Method in class product.SecondHandProduct
It prints the product's info when managed
printAllInfo() - Method in class product.StoreProduct
It prints the product's info when managed

It prints a sub-list of categories according to the desired page

It prints a sub-list of another according to the desired page

It prints a sub-list of another according to the desired page
printPackListPage(int) - Method in class store.Pager
It prints a sub-list of another according to the desired page
printPacks() - Method in class order.Cart
It prints a cart's pack's basic info
printProducts() - Method in class order.Cart
It prints a cart's product's basic info

It prints a sub-list of another according to the desired page
printReviewListPage(List<Review>, int) - Method in class store.Pager
It prints a sub-list of another according to the desired page
printReviews(int) - Method in class product.StoreProduct
It prints the product's review's basic info
printStoreProductListPage(List<StoreProduct>, int) - Method in class store.Pager
It prints a sub-list of another according to the desired page
processOffer() - Method in class exchange.Offer
It processes the offer exchange
product - package product
It includes everything product-unique.
Product - Class in product
It implements the abstract Product class
Product(double, String, String, String, ProductType) - Constructor for class product.Product
A product's constructor
Product(String, double, String, String, String, ProductType) - Constructor for class product.Product
A product's general constructor
PRODUCT - Enum constant in enum class discount.DiscountCoverage
Product discount coverage
PRODUCT_CART - Enum constant in enum class notification.NotificationType
 
productBySales() - Method in class main.ManagerLoop
It allows the manager to see the store's store products by their sales
productBySalesWithPercentage() - Method in class main.ManagerLoop
It allows the manager to see the store's store products by sales, with their percentage over the overall sales
productBySalesWithPercentageCertainMonth() - Method in class main.ManagerLoop
It allows the manager to see the store's store products by sales, with their percentage over the overall sales, on a certain month
ProductDiscount - Class in discount
It implements the general discount for those with Product coverage

A Product discount's constructor with default id

A Product discount's general constructor
ProductDiscountFactory - Class in discount
It implements the factory for those with store product coverage
ProductDiscountFactory(boolean) - Constructor for class discount.ProductDiscountFactory
Instantiates a new Product discount factory over the whole store
ProductDiscountFactory(StoreProduct[]) - Constructor for class discount.ProductDiscountFactory
Instantiates a new Product discount factory with a product selection
